name: Roboflow garbage can overflow
license: CC BY 4.0 as displayed by Roboflow Universe
recommendedUse: Best public match for bin fullness and overflow. Export as YOLO, then map full/open_full/close_full/trash_flow to overflow and empty/open_empty/close_empty/healthy to normal.

name: TACO: Trash Annotations in Context
license: Repository toolkit is MIT; dataset archive is open on Zenodo. Confirm image-level usage terms before commercial delivery.
recommendedUse: Use for loose litter/trash-object detection only. Do not map to overflow, dirty, or normal.

name: Mendeley Trash Detection Dataset
recommendedUse: Use YOLO-format boxes to pretrain a generic trash-object detector or map all boxes to litter for scene support.

name: Innovatiana Garbage Detection Dataset
recommendedUse: YOLOv5-compatible object detection supplement for material/trash objects. Not a scene-anomaly source.

name: UCI RealWaste
license: UCI dataset terms; confirm before redistribution
recommendedUse: Classification transfer-learning supplement only. Keep separate from scene anomaly model.

name: TrashCan 1.0
license: Academic teaching/research only; commercial use requires JAMSTEC permission
recommendedUse: Exclude from commercial customer demo unless permission is obtained. Domain is underwater and mismatched.

name: Unidata Outdoor Garbage Dataset
recommendedUse: Highly relevant if purchased or access is granted. Do not assume free reuse.
